blended.narrative: Schweitzer is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,520 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 62".
